title: Parking Garage Closure Notice
transcript: Attention faculty, staff, and students. Parking Garage B on the south side of campus will be closed for structural inspections from April 10th to April 12th. All vehicles must be removed from the garage by 8 PM on April 9th. During the closure, parking will be available in Garage C on West Campus Avenue with a complimentary shuttle service running every ten minutes between the garage and the main campus. Faculty and staff with reserved spots in Garage B have been contacted via email with alternative arrangements. We apologize for any inconvenience.

questions.stem: Why is Parking Garage B closing?
options: It will be converted into a building
questions.explanation: The garage will be closed for structural inspections.

questions.stem: How often will the shuttle service run?
questions.explanation: A complimentary shuttle service will run every ten minutes between Garage C and the main campus.
